items.name: Enigmatic Halloween Knitted Flared Blazer
items.description:
https://www.roblox.com/catalog?Keyword=Knits&Category=1&CreatorName=dubit&CreatorType=Group&salesTypeFilter=1

Delve into the enigmatic with our Enigmatic Halloween Knitted Flared Blazer, a captivating addition to your Roblox avatar's wardrobe. This flared blazer effortlessly combines style and intrigue, boasting an intricate knitted design adorned with enigmatic and alluring details. Whether you're exploring mysterious realms or enchanting fellow avatars at virtual masquerades, this blazer guarantees you'll be the focal point of fascination. The Enigmatic Halloween Knitted Flared Blazer exudes an aura of captivating elegance and charm, making it the ideal choice for those who seek to embrace the enigmatic spirit of Halloween. Elevate your avatar's allure and sophistication - seize your Enigmatic Blazer now and craft a Halloween experience like no other!
